{# Override ABlog's page.html so that ALL pages use Furo's real layout (with sidebars, navigation, ToC, etc.) while preserving ABlog features like the Atom feed link and post navigation on blog post pages. #} {% extends "furo/page.html" %} {% block left_sidebar %} {{ super() }}
Copyright © 2014–2026, Johannes Elias Lohbihler for dadamachines
{% endblock left_sidebar %} {% block extrahead %} {{ super() }} {%- if ablog is defined and feed_path is defined and feed_path %} {%- endif %} {%- if pagename == 'index' or pagename.endswith('/index') %} {%- endif %} {% endblock extrahead %} {% block content %} {%- if ablog is defined and pagename in ablog %} {# Blog post detail page — show metadata and post nav #} {% set post = ablog[pagename] %}
{# Post header: category badge → title → date (before hero image) #}
{%- if post.category %}
{%- for c in post.category -%} {{ c }} {%- if not loop.last %} {% endif -%} {%- endfor %}
{%- endif %}

{{ title }}

{%- if post.published %}

{{ post.date.strftime(ablog.post_date_format) }} {%- if post.author %} · {% for a in post.author %}{{ a }}{% if not loop.last %}, {% endif %}{% endfor %}{%- endif %} {%- if post.tags %} · {% for t in post.tags %}{{ t }}{% if not loop.last %}, {% endif %}{% endfor %}{%- endif %}

{%- endif %}
{# Hero image — shown after the title header #} {%- if meta and meta.cover %} {%- set depth = pagename.count('/') %}
{%- if meta.cover.startswith('http') %} {%- else %} {%- endif %}
{%- endif %}
{{ body }}
{# Prev / Next post navigation #} {% if post.published and ablog.post_show_prev_next %}
{% if post.prev %} {{ post.prev.title }} {% endif %} {% if post.next %} {{ post.next.title }} {% endif %}
{% endif %}
{%- else %} {{ super() }} {%- endif %} {% endblock content %}
